# TOC File Format

`_toc.md` files are fully generated. This page documents their structure.

## Output

```markdown
<!-- Auto-generated by build_toc.sh — edit context.cfg instead -->

# CONTEXT

> Context for the project — architecture and coding conventions

## Subfolders

| Folder | Description |
| ------ | ----------- |
| [CODING/](CODING/CODING_toc.md) | Shared coding standards *(read-only)* |
| [DATABASE/](DATABASE/DATABASE_toc.md) | Schema and migration patterns |

## Files

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| [architecture.md](architecture.md) | System components |
```

## Sections

| Section | When present |
|---------|--------------|
| Header comment | Always |
| Folder name heading | Always (uses the directory name) |
| Description blockquote | When `description` is set |
| Subfolders | Always (table or "_No context subfolders found._") |
| Files | Always (table or "_No context files found._") |

## Excluded Files

| Name | Reason |
|------|--------|
| `<folder>.md` | The source file for this TOC |
| `<folder>_toc.md` | This file itself |
| `context_toc.md` | Root TOC (at root level) |
| `_*`, `.*` | Underscore/dot-prefixed names |
| Names in `ignore` list | Explicitly excluded |
